% LNCS-style header for Pandoc → PDF
% Springer Lecture Notes in Computer Science approximation
% Two-column, 10pt, compact margins
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{bookmark}
\hypersetup{
    unicode=true,
    breaklinks=true,
    bookmarksnumbered=true,
    bookmarksopen=true,
    hypertexnames=false,
    plainpages=false,
    pdfpagelabels=true,
    colorlinks=true,
    linkcolor=black,
    citecolor=black,
    urlcolor=blue
}
